auth.tagline: Start studying in less than 30 seconds

dashboard.trainDescription: Practice with real simulations and increase your chances of passing Cloud certifications.

recommendations.lowScore: Your average is below 50%. How about reviewing the basics before taking more simulations?
recommendations.mediumScore: You're making good progress! Keep practicing to reach the passing score (70%).
recommendations.highScore: Excellent! You're above the passing score. Keep practicing to consolidate your knowledge.
recommendations.excellentScore: Congratulations! Your average is excellent. You're ready for the real exam!
recommendations.fewAttempts: Complete more simulations to get a better view of your performance and identify improvement points.
recommendations.incompleteAttempts: You have {count} incomplete simulations. Finish them for more accurate statistics.

exams.title: Exams

list.title: Available Exams
list.error: Error loading exams. Please try again.
list.empty: No exams available at the moment.

clp_c02.title: AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner (CLF-C02)
clp_c02.description: Practice exam for AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner certification with updated questions aligned to official exam content.

dva_c02.title: AWS Certified Developer - Associate (DVA-C02)
dva_c02.description: Practice exam with questions aligned to the content and difficulty level of the AWS Certified Developer – Associate certification for training and review.

ai_practitioner.title: AWS Certified AI Practitioner
ai_practitioner.description: Practice exam focused on artificial intelligence and machine learning on AWS, with questions aligned to the AWS Certified AI Practitioner certification content, ideal for those seeking to specialize in this field.

az_900.title: Microsoft Certified Azure Fundamentals (AZ-900)
az_900.description: Practice exam to assess knowledge of the fundamental concepts of Microsoft Azure, according to the topics covered in the certification.

ai_900.title: Microsoft Certified Azure AI Fundamentals (AI-900)
ai_900.description: Practice exam to assess knowledge of fundamental concepts of artificial intelligence and machine learning on Microsoft Azure, according to the topics covered in the certification.

exams.examCaption: Realistic simulation, result at the end

examFeatures.noExplanations: See explanations only at the end
